name: NEW_TARGETPAIRS_BY_TECHCLASS1_2024
description: New target pairs by TechnologyClass1 category in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH tp, min(y.year) AS first_year
WHERE first_year = $year
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, first_year
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: Within the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category, which target pairs were first disclosed in 2024?
For the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category, which target pairs first appeared in 2024?
Which target pairs in the Angiogenesis related functional combination TechnologyClass1 category were first disclosed in 2024?
